name: Emily, The Bride
ability: Each night, choose a player. You learn if they are a Townsfolk. Either the Bride or the Groom is drunk while both are alive. [+1 Groom]
firstNightReminder: The Bride chooses a player. Show the thumbs-up or thumbs-down. :reminder:
otherNightReminder: The Bride chooses a player. Show the thumbs-up or thumbs-down. :reminder:

name: Oskar, The Groom
ability: Each night, choose 2 players. You learn if at least one of them is a Minion. Either the Groom or the Bride is drunk while both are alive. [+1 Bride]
firstNightReminder: The Groom chooses 2 players. Show the thumbs-up or thumbs-down. :reminder:
otherNightReminder: The Groom chooses 2 players. Show the thumbs-up or thumbs-down. :reminder:

name: Priest
ability: On the 3rd night, you learn 2 Demons, at least 1 of which is in play.
otherNightReminder: On the 3rd night only: show 2 Demon character tokens. :reminder:

name: Best Man
ability: Each night, choose 2 players: you learn if they are the same alignment. There is a good player who registers as evil to you.
firstNightReminder: The Best Man chooses 2 players. Show the thumbs-up or thumbs-down. :reminder:
otherNightReminder: The Best Man chooses 2 players. Show the thumbs-up or thumbs-down. :reminder:

name: Maid of Honor
ability: You start knowing an in-play Outsider (or that none are in play) and an in-play Minion (or that none are in play).
firstNightReminder: Show an Outsider character token, or show zero. Show a Minion character token, or show zero. :reminder:

name: Photographer
ability: On day, publicly choose 5 players. That night, you learn how many were Outsiders.
otherNightReminder: If the Photographer chose 5 players today, show the number of Outsiders among them. :reminder:

name: Toastmaster
ability: Once per game, publicly give a toast. Neither the Bride nor the Groom can die before tomorrow.

name: Weird Uncle
ability: 1 of your Townsfolk neighbors is poisoned. If you are executed, one of your Townsfolk neighbors may die tonight.
otherNightReminder: If the Weird Uncle was executed today, one of their Townsfolk neighbors may die. :reminder:

name: Wedding Crasher
ability: Each night, choose an alive player. If they are a Townsfolk, they are drunk until dusk.
firstNightReminder: The Wedding Crasher chooses a player. If they are a Townsfolk, they are drunk. :reminder:
otherNightReminder: The Wedding Crasher chooses a player. If they are a Townsfolk, they are drunk. :reminder:

name: Malicious Organist
ability: If an Outsider dies at night, you learn a Townsfolk character and player. [+1 Outsider]
otherNightReminder: If an Outsider died tonight, show a Townsfolk character token and point to a player. :reminder:

name: Bad Caterer
ability: Each night, choose a player: they are poisoned until dusk. A chosen Grandmother dies instead, and all players learn that a Bad Caterer is in play.
firstNightReminder: The Bad Caterer chooses a player. They are poisoned. :reminder:
otherNightReminder: The Bad Caterer chooses a player. They are poisoned. If a Grandmother is chosen, they die instead and all learn a Bad Caterer is in play. :reminder:
